highlights.description: Module path migrated from `github.com/agentplexus` to `github.com/plexusone` organization
CI/CD migrated to shared workflows from `plexusone/.github`

changed.description: Updated dependency to `github.com/plexusone/agentkit` v0.5.0 (migrated from agentplexus org)
Docker image references updated from `ghcr.io/agentplexus/` to `ghcr.io/plexusone/`

infrastructure.description: Migrated to shared CI workflow from `plexusone/.github`
Migrated to shared lint workflow from `plexusone/.github`
Migrated to shared CodeQL SAST workflow from `plexusone/.github`

documentation.description: Updated README.md shields to reflect new organization

highlights.description: Initial release of Pulumi components for deploying agentkit-based agents to AWS Bedrock AgentCore

added.description: Native Go Pulumi components for AWS Bedrock AgentCore deployment
Fluent builder API (`AgentBuilder`, `StackBuilder`) matching agentkit-aws-cdk patterns
Configuration loading from JSON or YAML files via `NewStackFromFile`
VPC creation with public/private subnets across multiple AZs
NAT Gateway for private subnet internet access
Security Groups for agent network isolation
IAM Roles with Bedrock and Secrets Manager access
CloudWatch Log Groups with configurable retention

documentation.description: README with shields, installation, and usage examples
